svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="perception-pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-629" dy="-142" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="磁感知融合流水线：原始磁场块 → 多级估计 → 统一感知状态（声磁协同）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1020" x="30" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;" value="内层 200 Hz 逐样本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="150" x="30" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="原始磁场块
（block sampling）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="30" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="滤波 / RMS 包络
（filters）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="230" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="包络梯度+磁矢量
（vector）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="430" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="峰值检测
（peaks 升–峰–落）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="630" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="加权 PCA 中心线拟合
（fitter）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="830" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="局部路径几何
（local_path）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="1030" y="84" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="无峰磁路径/前视/影子
（magnetic_path）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="1030" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="横偏+埋深反演
（cross_track·burial）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="830" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="失锁重捕区
（reacquire_region）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="630" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="置信度融合
（confidence）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="150" x="430" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3a5f;" value="统一感知状态
PerceptionState
（输出契约）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="190" x="170" y="292" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#1f3a5f;" value="外层 20 Hz 输出" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="190" x="170" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" value="声呐定位观测
（sonar reading）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="150" x="830" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;fontColor=#666666;spacingLeft=8;" value="块采样双速率：外层每帧约 20 Hz 推进，磁力计内层 200 Hz 逐样本跑滤波 / RMS；拟合与置信度每外层帧计算一次。
声呐定位点侧向汇入拟合器，消除中心线方向歧义（声磁协同入口）。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="750" x="430" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="11" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="12" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="13" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="14" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" edge="1" parent="1" source="14" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="15" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="18" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;" target="19" target="20" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="110" edge="1" parent="1" source="30" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="14" value="声磁协同汇入"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
统一感知状态
PerceptionState
（输出契约）

div.div:
块采样双速率：外层每帧约 20 Hz 推进，磁力计内层 200 Hz 逐样本跑滤波 / RMS；拟合与置信度每外层帧计算一次。
声呐定位点侧向汇入拟合器，消除中心线方向歧义（声磁协同入口）。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 152px; margin-left: 875px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#9673a6, #9577a3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
